response.justification: Candidate has 15+ years of strong IC experience and some relevant developer-tooling work (Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI/CD setup, Selenium course), but the resume shows no people-management or formal team-leadership tenure, which is a hard requirement (2+ yrs people management, 3+ yrs tech lead). Mobile-platform exposure is also minimal (brief iOS/Apple TV stint in 2015-16). Profile reads as senior IC, not an engineering manager.
strengths: Long tenure (15+ yrs) across web, mobile, embedded, and dev-tools
Built developer tooling: Trial test runner, Fluent-Asserts, CI infra, Selenium course
Strong testing/craftsmanship background (TDD, pairing, trunk-based dev, workshops)
concerns: No evidence of people management or direct reports in any role
No clear technical-leadership title or scope (staff/principal/EM)
Limited mobile-platform ecosystem experience for a role centered on mobile dev productivity
